form.formComment: Good performance to win by a neck at Shepparton over 390m (22.74) beating Lochinvar Gift in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on March 26. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Plutocracy beaten 19 lengths (23.78). Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (24.42) over 425m at Bendigo. Drawn a inside box but prefer the place this line-up.
